'''lahaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qingheiite|qingheiite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qingheiite|qingheiite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lahaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhæbæth|læhæbæth]] || [[word:læhæbæj|læhæbæj]] || [[word:læhæbæsh|læhæbæsh]] || [[word:læhæbæ|læhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahahabath|lahahabath]] || [[word:lahahabaj|lahahabaj]] || [[word:lahahabash|lahahabash]] || [[word:lahahaba|lahahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahabath|lahabath]] || [[word:lahabaj|lahabaj]] || [[word:lahabash|lahabash]] || [[word:lahaba|lahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahafbafth|lahafbafth]] || [[word:lahafbafj|lahafbafj]] || [[word:lahafbafsh|lahafbafsh]] || [[word:lahafbaf|lahafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahabatha|lahabatha]] || [[word:lahabaja|lahabaja]] || [[word:lahabasha|lahabasha]] || [[word:lahabaka|lahabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahabath|lahabath]] || [[word:lahabaj|lahabaj]] || [[word:lahabash|lahabash]] || [[word:lahaba|lahaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahabathal|lahabathal]] || [[word:lahabajal|lahabajal]] || [[word:lahabashal|lahabashal]] || [[word:lahabakal|lahabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahabaathatha|lahabaathatha]] || [[word:lahabaajaja|lahabaajaja]] || [[word:lahabaashasha|lahabaashasha]] || [[word:lahabaaka|lahabaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahabathan|lahabathan]] || [[word:lahabajan|lahabajan]] || [[word:lahabashan|lahabashan]] || [[word:lahabakan|lahabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahabathaoro|lahabathaoro]] || [[word:lahabajaoro|lahabajaoro]] || [[word:lahabashaoro|lahabashaoro]] || [[word:lahabakaoro|lahabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
